evals.prompt: I want to set up a monorepo with multiple Next.js apps and shared UI packages. Where do I start?

evals.description: Triggers on Turborepo vs Nx decision question
evals.prompt: Should I use Turborepo or Nx for my JavaScript monorepo?

evals.description: Can write a correct turbo.json with proper task pipeline
evals.prompt: Write a turbo.json for a monorepo that has build, test, lint, and dev tasks with correct dependency ordering.

evals.description: Can write a correct pnpm-workspace.yaml and root package.json
evals.prompt: Show me how to configure pnpm workspaces for a monorepo with apps and packages directories.

evals.description: Can explain and implement workspace:* protocol for internal deps
evals.prompt: How do I reference one internal package from another in my pnpm monorepo?

evals.description: Can set up a shared TypeScript base config
evals.prompt: How do I share a TypeScript config across all packages in my monorepo?

evals.description: Can configure an internal package with proper exports using tsup
evals.prompt: How do I set up an internal utility package in my monorepo so other packages can import from it with proper types?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about outputs being too broad in turbo.json
evals.prompt: My Turborepo cache seems to be huge and slow. I set outputs to '**' to make sure everything is cached. Is that correct?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns against relying on hoisted undeclared dependencies
evals.prompt: I use lodash in my app package but I only declared it in the root package.json. It works fine. Is this okay?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about circular workspace dependencies
evals.prompt: My monorepo builds are hanging and I get weird task ordering errors. How do I debug this?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend Lerna as a primary monorepo tool
evals.prompt: Should I use Lerna for my new monorepo in 2024?

evals.description: References load: skill references tool-comparison reference file
evals.prompt: Where can I find a detailed feature comparison between Turborepo, Nx, and Bazel?
